project_name: SNE EMRTU reliability calculation - normalized import example

source.role: engineering reference example, not a hard-coded template

notes: Values are normalized from the reference engineering calculation.
Figure recognition is not treated as a reliable semantic source.

parameters.calculation_note: The 175-of-204 reserve group is shown as one aggregate block; P/Kg are taken from the reviewed reference table.

components.source_table: derived from table 4 aggregate B2 for visual nested demo

components.name: Distribution unit of junction boxes MKTN.674211.009

schemes.name: SNE top-level reliability scheme
notes: This top-level normalized scheme reproduces the tabular reference results.
The full textual section 5 also describes a reserve group 175 of 204; it is recorded separately as manual review.

schemes.name: SNE document visual demo scheme
schemes.source_reference: Reference document: section 5 visual structure, tables 4 and 5 for numeric values
notes: This is the demo shown by the SNE button: input -> aggregate reserve 175 of 204 -> component chain -> output.
The 175-of-204 reserve is intentionally one aggregate block, not 204 separate blocks.
The nested auxiliary chain is visual; its four internal probabilities multiply to the table 4 aggregate value for B2.
The k-of-N sliding loaded reserve formula is not claimed as verified; the block uses reviewed tabular P/Kg.

schemes.name: Auxiliary needs internal visual chain
schemes.source_reference: Demo decomposition of table 4 aggregate B2
notes: The four internal blocks are a readable visual decomposition for the editor demo.
Their product is normalized to the documented aggregate values of B2 for 158 h, 125 h and Kg.

schemes.name: Energy block - 154 identical elements in series
notes: Demonstrates substitution N = 154 for a repeated series chain.

schemes.name: SNE reserve group 175 of 204
notes: Exact k-of-N formula is not marked as verified and must be checked manually before normative use.

warnings: Reference source contains values that appear inconsistent between table products and conclusion text; table values are used here.
DOC/PDF figures are not imported as semantic schemes.
The demo visualizes the 175-of-204 reserve as one aggregate block; it is not expanded into 204 elements.
manual_review_required: Formula for sliding loaded reserve 175 of 204.
Any imported formula damaged by DOC/PDF conversion.
Durability/resource calculations if they are used as normative outputs.
conclusions: The normalized top-level scheme can be loaded, converted to the editor graph, calculated, and compared with the reference tables.
The example is a reference dataset, not a document-name-specific parser.
